tasks.title: M2.1 — Application Shell Foundation
tasks.notes: Plan Awaiting Approval (revised 2026-07-10 per the M2 delivery-reconciliation brief). M2.1 is now focused on the shell foundation: two layouts (AppLayout, AppEmptyLayout), two placeholder shell components (AppSidebarSlot, AppTopBarSlot), one presentational helper (AppShellRegion), and the migration of the M1.1 chrome. The sidebar items, top bar, breadcrumb, navigation registry, route metadata, page redesigns, and self-awareness dashboard are explicitly deferred to M2.2 / M2.3 / M2.4 / M2.5. The first action is to approve the revised plan and start M2.1 implementation, or amend the plan and re-submit it.

tasks.title: M2.2 — Navigation Registry and Sidebar
tasks.notes: Plan stub (2026-07-10). Introduces INavigationRegistry, RouteMetadata, RouteMetadataAttribute, RouteRegistry, AppSidebar, AppSidebarItem, AppNavItem. Applies [RouteMetadata] to every page; activates the Pages_AreReachable_Through_Registry architecture test. Promoted to a full plan when M2.1 closes.

tasks.title: M2.3 — Top Bar, Breadcrumbs, and Page Headers
tasks.notes: Plan stub (2026-07-10). Populates the M2.1 AppTopBarSlot with the real top bar (theme toggle, user avatar) and the breadcrumb (composed into AppPageHeader.Breadcrumbs from the M2.2 registry's Parent chain). Promoted to a full plan when M2.2 closes.

tasks.title: M2.4 — Project Intelligence Dashboard
tasks.notes: Plan stub (2026-07-10). Implements the read-only /dashboard page (the M2 landing page per docs/dashboard.md). Introduces IProjectIntelligenceReader that reads .ai/state/*.json. Renders M0.5-data sections in the Populated state; M3+-data sections in the Empty state. Promoted to a full plan when M2.3 closes.

tasks.title: M2.5 — Empty Routes, Responsive, and Accessibility
tasks.notes: Summary entry. Full-coverage pass over every route; responsive matrix at the 1280x720 minimum; full keyboard smoke test. Will be planned in detail after M2.4 closes.

tasks.title: M2.6 — M2 Closeout and Treehouse Dogfooding
tasks.notes: Summary entry. M2 closeout per the M1 closeout template (verification, gap-fixing, deferred-review record, handoff, project-continuity update, M3 plan preparation) plus the external Treehouse dogfooding checkpoint per ROADMAP.md M2. Will be planned in detail after M2.5 closes.

tasks.title: M1 follow-up — Add AppToolbar example to /design-system
tasks.notes: Cosmetic; the AppToolbar component ships and is unit-tested, but the DesignSystem.razor page does not include a Toolbar section. 18/19 component CSS classes appear in the rendered HTML. The work is small and can be folded into M2.1 if appropriate.

tasks.title: M1 dogfooding — lavish-axi design-system review
tasks.blocker: lavish-axi is not installed on the host. The only artefact on the filesystem is agent-workbench/tools/lavish-axi.md, a spec for an event-bus daemon, not a review tool. See .ai/reviews/M1-design-system-lavish-axi-review.md.
tasks.notes: Defer indefinitely; resume when lavish-axi is installed or when an alternative review tool is available.

tasks.title: M2 — Application Shell and Navigation (summary)
tasks.notes: M2.1, M2.2, M2.3, M2.4, M2.5, M2.6 in the master delivery plan. Awaiting T-001 (M2.1).

tasks.title: M4 — Process Execution, Capability Detection, Provider Registry (summary)
tasks.notes: Slices M4-A, M4-B, M4-C, M4-D in the master delivery plan. Awaits M3.

tasks.title: M8 — Autonomous Loops, Orchestration, Production Hardening (summary)
M0.5 — Architecture Refinement and Project Intelligence
tasks.notes: The 10 required improvements landed: VISION.md, .ai/backlog/, structured state, decision log, capability mapping, dashboard definition, self-awareness state, dogfooding evolution, doc architecture validation, architecture review. Closed 2026-07-10 with the coherent commit 1d98acd (docs(m0.5): add project intelligence and structured delivery state).
